varieties.name: Purple Amaranth / Red Amaranth 🌱 (A. cruentus)
varieties.traits: Purple-red stems and leaves, 1.5m tall, 70cm wide
varieties.growing_notes: Nutritious leaves and seeds, high in iron and vitamin C
varieties.availability: humid subtropical climates Edible Gardening, The Seed Collection (humid subtropical climates, Bundaberg, Gold Coast region)

varieties.name: Grain Amaranth 🌱 (A. cruentus/hypochondriacus)
varieties.traits: Annual growing to 100cm, grown for seeds and edible leaves
varieties.yield_notes: Good seed production, continuous leaf harvest
varieties.growing_notes: Seeds ground for flour, cooked whole, or popped; leaves eaten raw or cooked like spinach

varieties.name: Love Lies Bleeding 🏆 (A. caudatus)
varieties.traits: Long drooping plumes of deep red/crimson-purple, 3-5 feet tall
varieties.growing_notes: Victorian favorite, dramatic cascading flowers up to 60cm long, edible seeds and leaves
varieties.availability: Bunnings Australia, The Seed Collection, Australian nurseries

varieties.name: Perfecta (Joseph's Coat) 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: 4 different colored leaves - yellow, crimson upper leaves; green, chocolate brown lower leaves. Height to 42 inches (1m)
varieties.yield_notes: Excellent ornamental and edible leaf production
varieties.growing_notes: Multi-colored ornamental foliage, edible leaves
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection Australia (humid subtropical climates region)

varieties.name: Chinese Amaranth (Chinese Spinach) 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Sweet tangy flavor, various leaf colors (green, red, variegated)
varieties.growing_notes: Young leaves for salads, cooked leaves for stir-fries and soups

varieties.name: Green Amaranth (Slender Amaranth) 🌱 (A. viridis)
varieties.traits: Light green leaves, often notched tips, grows to 1m tall
varieties.growing_notes: Edible leaves, fast growing
varieties.availability: Self-seeds in humid subtropical climates gardens, naturalized

varieties.name: Hot Biscuits 🌱 (A. cruentus)
varieties.traits: Orange-brown drooping spikes, sturdy uniform plants, 46 inches (117cm) tall
varieties.growing_notes: Excellent cut flower variety, edible seeds and leaves
varieties.availability: Seedman, international suppliers shipping to Australia

varieties.name: Opopeo Amaranth 🏆 (A. hybridus)
varieties.traits: Bright red spikes on tall stems, 6-7 feet tall (180-210cm)
varieties.growing_notes: Excellent cut flower, dramatic height

varieties.name: Mira 🌱 (A. caudatus)
varieties.traits: Long ropes of bicolor blooms (lime green and rose), 36 inches (90cm)
varieties.growing_notes: Great dried flower, cascading habit

varieties.name: Green Torch 🌱 (A. hypochondriacus)
varieties.traits: Green flower heads, upright growth, 24 inches tall
varieties.growing_notes: Companion to red varieties, unique color

varieties.name: Coral Fountain 🏆 (Amaranthus sp.)
varieties.traits: Coral-colored fountain-like plumes
varieties.growing_notes: Ornamental value, cutting flower

varieties.name: Emerald Tassels 🌱 (Amaranthus sp.)
varieties.traits: Emerald green tassels
varieties.growing_notes: Unique green color for arrangements

varieties.name: Flaming Fountain 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Upper foliage red, crimson, bronze; lance-shaped leaves, 42 inches tall
varieties.growing_notes: Dramatic colorful foliage

varieties.name: Aurora 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Bright yellow topmost foliage, dark green lower leaves, 42 inches tall
varieties.growing_notes: Startling color contrast

varieties.name: Tampala 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Tasty greens variety
varieties.growing_notes: One of tastiest varieties for greens

varieties.name: Autumn's Touch 🌱 (A. cruentus)
varieties.traits: Bicolor plumes combining green and bronze, thick stems, 36 inches
varieties.growing_notes: Self-supporting, no staking needed

varieties.name: Polish Amaranth 🏆 (Amaranthus sp.)
varieties.origin: Poland via Wisconsin farmer Richard DeWild, Traditional
varieties.traits: Large green leaves, grows to 90cm, stunning purple-red form exists
varieties.yield_notes: Plenty of leaf production, attractive to birds
varieties.growing_notes: One of best tasting amaranth varieties, young leaves especially good
varieties.availability: True Leaf Market (certified organic), Heritage Harvest Seed Canada

varieties.name: Plainsman 🌱 (A. cruentus)
varieties.traits: Shorter, uniform maturity, 3-4 feet tall, brown/ivory seeds
varieties.growing_notes: Commercial grain variety, performs in dry conditions

varieties.name: Elephant Head 🏆 (Amaranthus sp.)
varieties.traits: Distinctive elephant-head shaped flower plumes
varieties.growing_notes: Unique ornamental form

varieties.name: Red Spike 🏆 (Amaranthus sp.)
varieties.traits: Red flowering spikes
varieties.growing_notes: Traditional flowering form

varieties.name: Red Garnet (Amaranth gangeticus) 🏆 (A. gangeticus (syn. A. tricolor))
varieties.traits: Broad vivid red dented leaves
varieties.growing_notes: Intense color for salads or cooked like spinach
varieties.availability: The Lost Seed Australia, heirloom suppliers

varieties.name: Cheera (Kerala Amaranth) 🌏🌱 (A. tricolor/viridis)
varieties.origin: tropical monsoon climates, India, Ancient indigenous
varieties.traits: Green or red leaves, traditional tropical monsoon climates vegetable
varieties.growing_notes: Consumed as "cheera thoran" (stir-fried with spices and red chilies)
varieties.availability: Local tropical monsoon climates markets, kitchen gardens, agricultural stores tropical monsoon climates

varieties.name: Kerala Red (Kerala Red Spinach) 🌏🏆 (A. dubius)
varieties.origin: Coastal tropical monsoon climates, India, Traditional
varieties.traits: Brightest red amaranth, intensely colored leaves, stems, flowers, 5-8 feet tall
varieties.yield_notes: 90-100 days to maturity, heavy seed production
varieties.growing_notes: Highly branched tassels, copious small black seeds, edible leaves and seeds

varieties.name: White Beauty (Paal Cheera) 🌏🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Gleaming milky-white stems, lush green leaves. "Paal/Pal" = milk in Malayalam
varieties.growing_notes: Tender tasty leaves ideal for stir fries, traditional cheera thoran

varieties.name: Kannara Local 🌏🏆 (A. tricolor)
varieties.origin: Karnataka/tropical monsoon climates region, Traditional indigenous
varieties.traits: Red-leaved variety, season-bound
varieties.growing_notes: Flowering November-December

varieties.name: Arun 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Red-leaved variety
varieties.growing_notes: Developed for tropical monsoon climates conditions
varieties.availability: State Horticulture Mission tropical monsoon climates, agricultural stores

varieties.name: Krishnasree 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Red-leaved variety
varieties.growing_notes: Bred for Indian tropical conditions

varieties.name: CO-1 (Coimbatore-1) 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.origin: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University, Developed variety
varieties.traits: Green-leaved variety, white rust resistant
varieties.growing_notes: Disease resistant, recommended for rainy season

varieties.name: CO-2 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Green-leaved variety
varieties.growing_notes: Second Coimbatore selection

varieties.name: CO-3 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Green-leaved variety
varieties.growing_notes: Third Coimbatore release

varieties.name: Mohini 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Green-leaved variety
varieties.growing_notes: Named variety for Indian tropics

varieties.name: Renusree 🌱 (A. tricolor)

varieties.growing_notes: Indian selection

varieties.name: Pusa Kiran 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.origin: IARI Delhi (natural cross A. tricolor × A. tristis), 1900s

varieties.name: Pusa Lal Chaulai 🌱 (A. tricolor)

varieties.name: Arka Suguana 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Broad green leaves, multicut variety
varieties.growing_notes: First picking 24 days, continues 90 days. Moderately resistant to white rust

varieties.name: Arka Arunima 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Broad dark purple leaves, multicut
varieties.growing_notes: First picking 30 days, subsequent cuttings 10-12 day intervals

varieties.name: Green Amaranth (Arai Keerai) 🌏🌱 (A. viridis)
varieties.traits: Light green, grows 10-80cm, notched leaf tips
varieties.growing_notes: Common wild edible, cooked vegetable
varieties.availability: Naturalized tropical monsoon climates, self-seeding in gardens

varieties.name: Amaranthus dubius (Arai Keerai) 🌏🌱 (A. dubius)
varieties.traits: Grows to 150cm, green or purple-tinged, branched flower spikes
varieties.growing_notes: Harvest 3-4 weeks after sowing

varieties.name: Laal Saag (Chaulai) 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Popular red leafy vegetable
varieties.growing_notes: Used in laal saag preparations

varieties.name: Callaloo / Caribbean Amaranth 🌱 (A. tricolor/viridis)

varieties.name: Red Callaloo 🌱 (A. tricolor)

varieties.name: Suriname Callaloo 🌱 (Amaranthus sp.)
varieties.traits: Lush bushy growth to 7 feet, copper seedheads

varieties.name: Chinese Giant Orange 🌱 (A. hypochondriacus)

varieties.name: Hopi Red Dye 🏆 (A. cruentus)
varieties.origin: Hopi Nation, Arizona USA, Ancient indigenous

varieties.growing_notes: Traditional dye plant, edible leaves (45 days) and seeds (110 days)

varieties.name: Mayo Indian 🏆 (Amaranthus sp.)
varieties.traits: Maroon red seed heads, edible leaves
varieties.growing_notes: Tasty seeds raw, sprouted, toasted, or flour

varieties.name: Tampala (Asian Selection) 🌱 (A. tricolor)
varieties.traits: Heat-tolerant greens
varieties.growing_notes: Excellent flavor, suitable for southern climates

varieties.name: Elephant Head 🏆 (Amaranthus sp.)
varieties.traits: Distinctive flower head shape
varieties.growing_notes: Ornamental and edible

varieties.name: Love Lies Bleeding (Tropical) 🏆 (A. caudatus)

varieties.name: Joseph's Coat (Tricolor) 🌱 (A. tricolor)

varieties.name: Amaranthus saradhiana 🌏🌱 (A. saradhiana)
varieties.origin: Southern Western Ghats, tropical monsoon climates, Described 2019

varieties.growing_notes: Scientific significance, unique pollen and seed architecture

varieties.name: Amaranthus rajasekharii 🌏🌱 (A. rajasekharii)
varieties.origin: tropical monsoon climates, South-West India, Described recently
varieties.traits: NEW tropical monsoon climates species, similar to A. dubius but distinct stem color, inflorescence structure
varieties.growing_notes: Endemic to tropical monsoon climates, distinct pollen and seed architecture
